case_title: YAKOVLEV, ALEX VS SF AMERICAN TAXICAB INC DBA AMERICAN TAXICAB

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SF AMERICAN TAXICAB INC DBA AMERICAN TAXICAB
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-02-2004, OFF CALENDAR DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PLTF TO RESET & RESERVE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SF AMERICAN TAXICAB INC DBA AMERICAN TAXICAB PER AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLTF & DEFT ON 3/1/04, BOTH PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE & AGREE THAT "IN THE EVENT DISPUTES ARISE BETWEEN THEM, BOTH PARTIES WILL BE BOUND BY THIS SF AMERICAN TAXICAB, INC. LEASED DRIVER/INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, WHILCH PROVIDES FOR FINAL & BINDING ARBITRATION FOR DISPUTES.. " STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
